name_en: Dionysus Mini Handbag. This Dionysus beige GG Supreme canvas bag is presented in a mini size, defined by the tiger head clasp, a symbol deeply loved by the House. Oatmeal leather decoration adds depth to the design, introducing tonal elements and contrasting textures.
name_cn:
Dionysus Mini Handbag. This Dionysus beige GG Supreme canvas bag is presented in a mini size, defined by the tiger head clasp, a symbol deeply loved by the House. Oatmeal leather decoration adds depth to the design, introducing tonal elements and contrasting textures.
Model: 752029.
Dimensions: 18*11.5*7.
Color: Khaki / PVC.
